description_long: This object is a cubic parcel with a predominantly black exterior, adorned with two parallel gold horizontal bands and geometric gold motifs encircling its upper section. One face features a vertical gold panel with intricate patterns and what appears to be script, suggesting a decorative or ceremonial function. The surface is smooth and hard, with a matte to slightly glossy finish, and the object appears solid and robust. The gold detailing is likely metallic or painted, contrasting with the matte black body. The object is reminiscent of a stylized, symbolic package or ceremonial box, possibly inspired by iconic architectural forms. Its size and proportions suggest it is a large, immovable parcel, not intended for transport by hand.
description: A large, black cubic parcel with gold horizontal bands and geometric motifs, featuring a decorative gold panel on one side. The surface is smooth, hard, and visually striking.
description_view_0: This view shows the front face with a prominent vertical gold panel featuring intricate designs and script, along with the gold bands and motifs.
description_view_1: This side displays only the gold bands and geometric motifs, with no additional panels or markings.
description_view_2: This view is similar to view 1, showing the gold bands and motifs without any decorative panel.
description_view_3: This side mirrors view 1 and 2 but includes a small circular marking near the lower right edge.
